title: Multiple failed logins followed by success
description: Three or more failed console logins were followed by a successful login.
recommended_action: Verify with the user, review login history, reset password if unauthorized, and enforce MFA.

title: New IAM access key created
description: A new long-term IAM access key was created.
recommended_action: Confirm whether the access key was approved. Disable and rotate the key if suspicious.

title: Possible IAM privilege escalation
description: Risky IAM permission change detected: AttachUserPolicy
recommended_action: Review IAM permission change, check actor activity, and remove unauthorized privileges.

title: CloudTrail logging modified or disabled
recommended_action: Immediately verify CloudTrail status, re-enable logging, and investigate the actor.

title: Root account console login detected
description: The AWS root account was used to log in successfully.
recommended_action: Verify whether root login was approved, confirm MFA usage, review all account activity after login, and avoid routine root account use.

title: Possible public S3 bucket exposure
description: S3 public access-related change detected for bucket: student-public-test-bucket
recommended_action: Review bucket public access settings, inspect bucket policy/ACL changes, restore private access if unauthorized, and confirm business justification.

title: Security group opened to the internet
description: Security group ingress allows internet access on port 22-22.
recommended_action: Review the security group rule, remove 0.0.0.0/0 if not approved, restrict access to trusted IPs, and verify exposed services.
